title: Egyptian Paella
description: A flavorful and aromatic Egyptian-inspired paella dish featuring tangy and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: Dried tangy spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced shattering peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Egyptian rice, paella, and dried tangy spices. Stir to combine.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
